category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a build tool for PureScript projects; official GitHub README identifies Pulp as a build tool for PureScript projects.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pulp; official repository title is purescript-contrib/pulp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for this tool.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PureScript build-tool role; source_facts.executables lists the pulp CLI.
